servinfo.title: Fuel Pump Description
servinfo.ptxt: The fuel pump (1) is an in-tank type electric pump. Incorporated in the pump assembly are;
fuel filter (2), fuel pressure regulator (3), fuel level sensor (4) and jet pump (5).
The fuel jet pump (5) is installed in the way of fuel return line in order to feed fuel in the fuel tank chamber [a] to the fuel tank chamber [b]. The jet pump has a venturi (6).

When the fuel pump operates, fuel in the chamber [a] is sucked through the fuel suction pipe (7) by the negative pressure produced at the venturi due to the fuel return flow from the fuel pressure regulator and is delivered to the chamber [b].

entry.ptxt: Pressurized fuel from fuel pressure regulator
Fuel fed from fuel suction pipe
